title: chrysanthemum pseudachillea
intro: Chrysanthemum pseudochillea, also known as the Chinese Chrysanthemum or Fangji, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum pseudochillea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Chrysanthemum pseudochillea is often used in teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being incorporated into traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall well-being.
